title: cryptoloma pilosum
intro: Cryptoloma pilosum, also known as Rock Cress or Sea Cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family, commonly found in coastal areas and rocky outcrops. The medicinal properties of Cryptoloma pilosum include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the airways. Herbal preparations of Cryptoloma pilosum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
